---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
toc: false
---

Four versions of my CV are rebuilt weekly from the same data sources as
this website. Pick whichever length suits your purpose.

::: {.cv-downloads}
<a class="cv-card" href="cv/CV - Assoc Prof Taren Sanders.pdf">
  <span class="cv-name">Full CV</span>
  <span class="cv-desc">Complete record — publications, funding, teaching, service.</span>
</a>
<a class="cv-card" href="cv/CV - Assoc Prof Taren Sanders (5 page).pdf">
  <span class="cv-name">5-page CV</span>
  <span class="cv-desc">Condensed version suitable for most applications.</span>
</a>
<a class="cv-card" href="cv/CV - Assoc Prof Taren Sanders (2 page).pdf">
  <span class="cv-name">2-page CV</span>
  <span class="cv-desc">Short form for quick introductions.</span>
</a>
<a class="cv-card" href="cv/CV - Assoc Prof Taren Sanders (2 page with publications).pdf">
  <span class="cv-name">2-page + selected publications</span>
  <span class="cv-desc">Short CV with a curated set of key papers.</span>
</a>
:::

The build pipeline that produces these PDFs (and this website) is open
source — see the [repository](https://github.com/tarensanders/cv) for the
data sources and rendering code.
